What We Do

One Ecosystem.
Two Powerful Services.

DROPD is more than a courier. We digitalize your business and deliver your orders — all under one brand, one system, one invoice.

Dropd Deliveries

Same-day, on-demand, and standard courier across Trinidad & Tobago. Every delivery is GPS-tracked and closes with a photo, GPS stamp, and digital signature.

→ Dropd Now · Same-Day · Standard

Dropd Business

We digitalize your SME from the ground up — Google presence, WhatsApp Business, website, online payments, and 30 days of social content. Fully online in 7 days.

→ Launchpad · Growth Engine · Full Transformation

Dropd Vault

Insured, ID-verified delivery for high-value items. Exclusively assigned to our most trusted Senior and Principal drivers. Peace of mind on every drop.

→ By appointment · Principal drivers only
How It Works

Three Steps. Zero Stress.

From booking to proof of delivery — the entire process is automated, tracked, and documented.

1

Book

Order online via our booking form or send us a WhatsApp message at +1 (868) 290-4420. Takes less than 2 minutes.

2

We Dispatch

Your nearest available driver is assigned instantly via Shipday AI dispatch. You receive a live GPS tracking link the moment they are on the way.

3

Delivered with Proof

Your package arrives on time with a GPS-stamped photo and digital signature — stored in the cloud. No disputes. Just proof.

Start Your First Delivery →
Why DROPD

Built Different.
For the Caribbean.

We don't just move packages. We move businesses forward.

Live GPS Tracking

Know exactly where your delivery is at every moment. Real-time updates sent directly to you and your customer the second your driver is dispatched.

Photo Proof of Delivery

Every drop is documented with a timestamped photo, GPS location, and digital signature. Stored in the cloud. No more "I never received it."

Built for SMEs

No contracts. No minimum volumes. No fleet to manage. DROPD scales with your business — whether you send 5 deliveries a week or 500.

Driver-First Culture

Our drivers earn 67% of every fare — the highest split in Trinidad. Happy, motivated drivers deliver a better experience for your customers. Every time.

Caribbean-First

DHL doesn't care about your 5,000 sq mi island. We do. DROPD is built for Trinidad first — local payment rails, local culture, local execution.

One Ecosystem

Your sales flow through our digital tools. Your orders flow through our drivers. Cancelling one breaks the other. That's not lock-in — that's integration.

Delivery Services

Clear Rates. No Surprises.

Every service includes live GPS tracking and photo proof of delivery. What you see is what you pay.

Service What It Is Standard Zone Extended Zone Timeframe
Dropd Now On-demand, immediate dispatch TT$XX TT$XX Within the hour
Dropd Same-Day Scheduled same-day delivery TT$XX TT$XX Within 4 hours
Dropd Standard Next business day delivery TT$XX TT$XX 24 hours
Dropd Vault Insured, high-value delivery TT$XX TT$XX By appointment

All deliveries include live GPS tracking · Photo proof of delivery · Digital signature · Cloud storage

67% of Every Fare

Driver App

Rank & Grow
Start as Rookie. Earn your way to Icon through performance and consistency.
Weekly Hustle Board
Top 3 drivers by drop count earn a 10–20% fare bonus every Friday.
Goods-in-Transit Cover
Every assigned delivery carries insurance. You are protected on every drop.
Referral Bonuses
Refer a driver: TT50. Refer a business client: 2% of their spend for 3 months.
